title: Direct Routing and Bounded Worker Pools · Runtime Contract: Worker Effect Evidence
summary: A Go 1.26 service team must combine direct routing with bounded goroutines, prefetch, dependency capacity, and acknowledgement after durable effect; reviewers reject hidden goroutine ownership, unbounded work, stale channel state, and claims that stop at a nil client error. The learner predicts values, ownership transitions, and stop paths before seeing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the worker effect evidence increment in a capacity-aware Go work distribution service. Learners progr…
objectives: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Measure service time, prefetch, unacknowledged work, capacity, and tenant fairness instead of equating round robin with fair completion; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Worker Effect Evidence · Theory Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go messaging team handles case 4835 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
